title: Detailed Implementation Phasing — H2 2026
subtitle: Component-level delivery timeline · Hybrid A+C approach · 20 weeks to full capability · Start: June 2026
goalReminder: Target: 50% faster, 50% cheaper software delivery. Each capability contributes a share of the projected 5–7.5 M€/year savings.

components.name: AI Gateway Configuration
components.detail: LLM routing via UPM centralized AI Gateway. Multi-model support (Azure OpenAI, future Claude/Gemini).

components.name: Terraform IaC Foundation
components.detail: Base Terraform modules: Container Apps, AI Search, Key Vault, Entra ID. Reuses AI Landing Zone patterns.

components.name: OpenTelemetry Observability
components.detail: Structured trace pipeline for all agents. Feeds AI CoE centralized observability.

components.name: MCP: Confluence Connector
components.detail: Read/write to Confluence spaces. Used by Knowledge, Intent Translator, and Sparring agents.

components.name: MCP: SharePoint Connector
components.detail: Document search, read, update via Microsoft Graph. Shared by Knowledge and Intent agents.

components.name: MCP: Azure DevOps Connector
components.detail: Work items, pipelines, repos. Used by Demand, Builder, and QA agents.

components.name: MCP: ServiceNow Connector
components.detail: Demand intake, incident data, knowledge base. Used by Demand and Intent agents.

components.name: MCP: Jira Connector
components.detail: Issue tracking, backlog management. Used by Demand, Builder, and QA agents.

components.name: Azure AI Search — Knowledge Index
components.detail: Unified vector store for docs, architecture, project history. RAG backbone for caps 1, 2, 4.

components.name: A2A Agent Card Standard
components.detail: Standardized agent discovery and communication protocol. Required by AI CoE.

components.name: Agent Runtime (Semantic Kernel)
components.detail: Python + Semantic Kernel base for custom agents. Foundation for caps 2, 4 and future expansion.

components.name: GitHub Copilot Agent Mode
components.detail: Already approved & active. Configure agent mode for spec-to-code, multi-file edits, PR creation.

components.name: CodeRabbit PR Review
components.detail: AI-powered code review on every PR. RFQ-named tool. Configure rulesets for UPM standards.

components.name: Semgrep OSS Scanning
components.detail: OSS license compliance and vulnerability scanning. Semgrep (open-source) as interim — Black Duck procurement decision Q4 2026.

components.name: Quality Gates Agent
components.detail: Automated gate checks before merge: test pass, coverage threshold, SAST/DAST clean, review approved.

components.name: Builder Orchestration Agent
components.detail: Spec-to-code task decomposition. Coordinates Copilot, CodeRabbit, and quality gates.

components.name: Test Generation (Copilot)
components.detail: Test case generation from specs/requirements. TDD contract stubs. Edge-case suggestions.

components.name: Playwright/Cypress Automation
components.detail: Non-SAP E2E test automation. GitHub Actions pipeline for automated test execution.

components.name: SAP Joule Test Generation
components.detail: SAP-domain test generation (ABAP/RAP). Orchestrated by quality agent, not replaced.

components.name: Quality Spec Agent
components.detail: Automated TDD contract generation from approved specs. Dual-phase: specification quality + test automation.

components.name: Test Report Agent
components.detail: Coverage dashboards, defect severity analysis, release readiness reports for stakeholders.

components.name: M365 Copilot · SharePoint Search
components.detail: Copilot in Word + M365 Chat over SharePoint/OneDrive/Graph. Immediate knowledge search.

components.name: RAG Pipeline (Confluence + SP)
components.detail: Vector index over Confluence, SharePoint, Solman docs. Semantic search with source citations.

components.name: Knowledge Intelligence Agent
components.detail: Copilot Studio agent with RAG. Doc gap detection, freshness scoring, update recommendations.

components.name: Doc Update Agent
components.detail: Automated doc cleanup, guideline alignment checking, HITL sign-off before publish. Shared with cap 3.

components.name: Teams Meeting Transcription
components.detail: Meeting recaps, action items, follow-ups via Teams Copilot. Feeds into spec drafting.

components.name: Spec Drafting (Word Copilot)
components.detail: Draft feature specs from prompts, meeting notes, Outlook threads in Word.

components.name: Business-to-Tech Spec Agent
components.detail: Structured NL-to-spec translation. Domain model awareness, acceptance criteria generation.

components.name: ServiceNow Spec Write-back
components.detail: Approved specs auto-filed as ServiceNow demands. Closes the intent-to-demand loop.

components.name: Historical Project Data Ingest
components.detail: Index historical projects from ADO/Keto/ServiceNow into vector store for estimation baselines.

components.name: Feature Requirement Agent
components.detail: Impact analysis, effort estimation, duplicate detection. Python + Semantic Kernel on AI Foundry.

components.name: Project Structure Creation
components.detail: Auto-generate project timelines, WBS, resource plans from approved demands.

components.name: Architecture Catalog Ingest
components.detail: Index enterprise architecture catalog, dependency registry, ADRs into vector store.

components.name: Architecture Sparring Agent
components.detail: Interactive sparring with graph reasoning. ADR generation, compliance flagging, pattern matching.

components.name: Complexity & Risk Assessment Agent
components.detail: Cross-system impact analysis, NFR validation, dependency risk scoring.

components.name: AI Capability Lead Assignment
components.detail: One lead per capability. Bridges business, IT, and vendor; tracks KPIs; owns end-to-end realisation.

components.name: AI SDLC Champion Recruitment
components.detail: One champion per delivery domain. First adopter, coaches peers, surfaces friction, submits improvement feedback to AI CoE.

components.name: Knowledge Curator Designation
components.detail: Per domain/system team. Maintains knowledge base quality for capability 1; ensures docs are current and structured.

components.name: Context Engineer Onboarding
components.detail: Designs and maintains agent instructions (prompts, guardrails, context) for coding agents. Owns AI-generated code quality.

components.name: AI QA Specialist Designation
components.detail: Designs and validates TDD contracts fed to AI; reviews AI-generated test scripts; owns test coverage quality.

components.name: Executive Briefing & Awareness
components.detail: C-level and IT leadership briefing. Transformation vision, KPI framework socialisation, sponsor identification per capability.

components.name: AI Champion Enablement Workshop
components.detail: Champion role definition and recruitment. 2-day enablement programme with access to preview capabilities.

components.name: Wave 1: PMs, BAs & Architects
components.detail: Role-specific workshops for caps 1-4. Hands-on exercises with real UPM data. Prompt writing and governance walkthrough.

components.name: Wave 2: Developers & QA Engineers
components.detail: GitHub Copilot agent mode training. TDD contract design. CodeRabbit onboarding. Worksoft AI extensions. Playwright basics.

components.name: Vendor AI Onboarding Programme
components.detail: GitHub Copilot seats issued to vendor devs. 2-day onboarding workshop. Scoped access to UPM knowledge bases.

components.name: Embedded Coaching & Office Hours
components.detail: Weekly AI office hours. Champion-led peer coaching. AI output review sessions. Prompt library building in shared Confluence.

components.name: Community of Practice Launch
components.detail: Champion network self-sustaining. Monthly KPI review with teams. Best practice sharing. Friction retrospectives.

components.name: G1: Study → Design
components.detail: AI impact analysis completed. Demand compared to backlog. Reuse opportunities documented. Effort estimate from historical data.

components.name: G2: Design → Realise
components.detail: Structured spec (AI-assisted) approved. Measurable acceptance criteria defined. Tech impact mapped. No open ambiguity flags.

components.name: G3: Realise → Deploy
components.detail: Architecture sparring completed. ADR stored. Dependency map approved by Architect. Compliance check passed.

components.name: G4: Deploy → Run
components.detail: All test suites pass. Coverage thresholds met. AI quality gate report signed by QA. AMS knowledge base updated.

components.name: Vendor SOW Addendum Templates
components.detail: All new development SOWs require: GitHub Copilot usage mandatory, CodeRabbit PR review, AI output logs per sprint.

components.name: Vendor AI Governance Forum
components.detail: AI usage review with vendor leads. Issue resolution, shared learning, contractual compliance. Non-compliance escalated to sourcing.

components.name: Efficiency Gain Data Collection
components.detail: Collect AI efficiency data from vendor teams. Hours saved per capability. Negotiate gain sharing or blended rate reduction.

components.name: RFx Criteria Update with AI KPIs
components.detail: Future RFx includes: vendor AI adoption score, demonstrated efficiency gains, AI tooling plan. AI weighted at 20% of technical scoring.

components.name: AMS Runbooks & Dashboards
components.detail: Agent runbooks (inputs, outputs, failure modes). Observability dashboards live before handover.

components.name: AMS Shadow Team (4 weeks)
components.detail: AMS team participates in last 4 weeks. Shadow operations, incident co-handling, handover sign-off.

crossDomain.headline: Cross-Domain Reusability
crossDomain.subtext: Components built once, consumed by multiple capabilities and future expansions (Caps 7–11 in H1 2027).

items.expandsTo: New capability onboarding in days, not weeks
All future agents share same runtime + deployment model
AI CoE centralized monitoring, cost tracking, audit compliance
